instructions.notes: Scalar float ALU new in CDNA3

instructions.description: Read scalar from lane of VGPR
Write scalar to lane of VGPR
Buffer load 16-bit into low half of VGPR

instructions.notes: Two independent reads; can detect bank conflicts
Does not actually access LDS memory; uses LDS HW for data routing
512 FP16 FLOPs per instruction. Uses AccVGPRs.
FP8 MFMA new in CDNA3 (MI300). 2x throughput vs FP16 MFMA.
Structured sparse MFMA, 2:4 sparsity pattern. gfx950 only.

instructions.description: Wait for outstanding memory operations. vmcnt=vector mem, lgkmcnt=LDS/GDS/scalar mem
instructions.notes: Critical for correctness. Over-conservative waitcnts hurt performance.
Synchronizes all wavefronts in a workgroup
Higher priority wavefronts get scheduled first
